## Diagnosis

**Root cause:** The `external_plugins/discord/server.ts` file used by GigaClungus had `const INJECT_PORT = 9876` hardcoded (line 735), while the newer cached version (`0.0.4`) correctly reads `parseInt(process.env.DISCORD_INJECT_PORT ?? "9876")`. BigClungus already owns port 9876, so when GigaClungus's bun plugin tried to bind it, `Bun.serve` threw an uncaught exception. This interrupted top-level execution f...(truncated)
